Meet the Therapist

Photo by Usman Yousaf on Unsplash

Dr. John Doe

12 Years of experience and a BSc in Physiotherapy, Dr John Doe prides himself on his innovative approach to rehabilitation, focusing on quick, efficient recoveries, returning you to action ASAP.

Peak Performance Physio

Dedicated to restoring mobility, managing pain, and helping you reach your physical peak through evidence-based care.

Hours:

Mon - Fri: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Sat: 8:00 AM - 1:00 PM
